name: Sparky
title: Chief Governing Overseer — AI Employee Factory
upgrade_summary: v3.1.0 retrofit: added persona/operations separation (AGENTS.md), session continuity system (SESSION-STATE.md, working-buffer.md, HEARTBEAT.md), deployment architecture (INSTALLATION_TARGETS.json, LAUNCH_CONTRACT.json, live/), concrete communication style examples in IDENTITY.md, specific benchmarks in SUCCESS_METRICS.md, 3 new handoff templates, updated KNOWLEDGE_MAP.json.
deployment_blockers: Live build not validated (npm run build not run)
Field testing not performed (min 5 real governance cycles required)
agent.ts not audited against expanded schema.ts
notes: AGENTS.md is the canonical session entry point — read this first every session.
Context7 connector instability observed; apply degraded-mode evidence quality when unavailable.
OpenClaw integration paths are defined in INSTALLATION_TARGETS.json but are not yet integration-tested.
schema.ts was significantly expanded in v3.0.0; agent.ts alignment audit is pending.
WORKFLOWS.md and TOOLS.md are strong pre-existing files that need a cross-reference audit against upgraded doctrine.
live/src/index.ts is the new typed entrypoint; live/index.ts is the legacy entrypoint — both remain for compatibility.
